summary: Tightened the breakfast handoff from chapter 5 and clarified that Dell is still holding back part of what he found, so the interrupted morning carryover into chapter 7 lands more cleanly. The visible adjacent opening used a different structural scaffold, so no opening rewrite was needed.
edits: Made the opening breakfast setup more explicit by tying Dell's waiting to Cora setting him to the trace.
Added a final bridge that leaves part of Dell's account pending until breakfast.
